name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue with F2K

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened instead.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., macOS, Windows, Linux]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- Node.js version: [e.g., 18.0.0]
- npm version: [e.g., 9.0.0]

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Console Errors
Please include any console errors or stack traces:

```
Paste error here
```

## Severity
- [ ] Critical (app is broken, data loss)
- [ ] High (feature doesn't work, major impact)
- [ ] Medium (feature partially works)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic issue, minor impact)

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
